endpoints.name: sleep_test
endpoints.description: Sleep for N seconds (default 60) and return the elapsed time. Useful for testing client timeouts and async polling loops.

output_schema.description: Actual elapsed wall-clock time in seconds

endpoints.name: ai_enrich
endpoints.description: Enrich, classify, extract, or summarize text using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Perplexity.

model.description: Model override (e.g. gpt-4o); defaults to provider default

prompt.description: Prompt template; use {{fieldName}} placeholders for dynamic values

context.description: Key-value pairs for template substitution in the prompt

provider.description: AI provider: openai, anthropic, gemini, or perplexity

output_type.description: Output format: text or json (json forces structured output)

output_schema.description: JSON schema to guide structured output (when output_type is json)

system_prompt.description: System prompt / instructions for the model

use_web_search.description: Enable web search (supported by OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Perplexity)

search_domain_filter.description: Perplexity only — limit search to specific domains

search_recency_filter.description: Perplexity only — filter by recency: day, week, month, year

endpoints.name: post_activities
endpoints.description: Get likes, comments and reactions on a specific LinkedIn post.

output_schema.description: Public URL to the LinkedIn post
Post author: profileId, firstName, lastName, headline, profilePicture
Comment list. Each: id, comment, totalComments, totalReactions, url, commenter
Reaction list. Each: reaction (LIKE/PRAISE/etc.), reactor profile
Attached content: image, video, article, document, poll (null when absent)

endpoints.name: post_details
endpoints.description: Get full post details including text, media, comments and reaction counts.

comments.description: Include comments in the response (default true)

reactions.description: Include reactions in the response (default true)

output_schema.description: LinkedIn ugcPost URN of the thread
Reaction counts by type e.g. {like: 91, praise: 4}
Post author: profileId, firstName, lastName, headline, profilePicture, entityUrn, profileType
Comment list (only when comments=true). Each: id, comment, totalComments, totalReactions, url, commenter
Commenter profile: profileId, firstName, lastName, headline, profilePicture, entityUrn
Reaction list (only when reactions=true). Each: reaction (LIKE/PRAISE/etc.), reactor
Reactor profile: profileId, firstName, lastName, headline, profilePicture, entityUrn
Attached content object: image, video, article, document, poll, celebration, entity, showcase (null when absent)
Document attachment: title, totalPages, documentUrl, expiry
Whether the post is a sponsored/promoted post

endpoints.name: profile_activities

urn.description: LinkedIn entity URN of the profile

type.description: Activity type filter: POST, COMMENT, or REACTION (default: all)

output_schema.description: Ad metadata: format, advertiserName, paidBy, ranFrom, ranTo

endpoints.name: ad_search
endpoints.description: Search LinkedIn Ad Library for active ads by advertiser, keyword, or country.

searchUrl.description: Full LinkedIn Ad Library search URL (alternative to individual filters)

dateOption.description: Date range: last-30-days, current-month, current-year, last-year, or custom-date-range

output_schema.description: Ad content (headline, body, CTA, image URL)
Pagination info including paginationToken for next page

endpoints.name: email_finding
endpoints.description: Find professional email addresses using first name, last name and domain. Async via webhook.

refId.description: Your reference ID (echoed back in webhook payload)

lastname.description: Last name (either firstname or lastname required)

firstname.description: First name (either firstname or lastname required)

data.description: List of people to find emails for

webhook.description: URL to receive results when the job completes

output_schema.description: Async job ID — use with email_finding_inquiry to poll status

endpoints.name: email_finding_inquiry
endpoints.description: Check the status of an async email finding job.

jobId.description: Job ID returned by email_finding (passed as a path segment)

output_schema.description: Job status: pending, processing, completed, or failed
Results when completed — each item: refId, email, status, confidence

endpoints.name: email_verification
endpoints.description: Verify email deliverability and validity before sending. Async via webhook.

refId.description: Your reference ID (echoed back in webhook payload)

webhook.description: URL to receive results when the job completes

output_schema.description: Async job ID — use with email_verification_inquiry to poll status

endpoints.name: email_verification_inquiry
endpoints.description: Check the status of an async email verification job.

jobId.description: Job ID returned by email_verification (passed as a path segment)

output_schema.description: Job status: pending, processing, completed, or failed
Results when completed — each item: refId, email, valid, status, disposable, mxFound

endpoints.name: company_posts
endpoints.description: Get recent posts published by a LinkedIn company. Supports filtering by date recency and cursor-based pagination.

company.description: LinkedIn company URL (use this, companyId, or companyUniversalName)

postedLimit.description: Pre-filter posts by recency: 24h, week, or month

paginationToken.description: Cursor token from previous page response (required for page > 1)

scrapePostedLimit.description: Scrape posts until this recency threshold is met: 24h, week, or month (overrides postedLimit)

companyUniversalName.description: Last path segment of the company LinkedIn URL (e.g. texauhq)

output_schema.description: List of company posts (billed at 0.2 credit per element)
Author info (id, name, type, linkedinUrl, avatar)
Post timestamp (timestamp ms, ISO date, postedAgoText)
Attached video (thumbnailUrl, videoUrl) — null if no video
Attached document/carousel (title, coverPages, totalPageCount) — null if none
Poll data (question, options, totalVotes, closed) — null if no poll
Engagement stats: likes, comments, shares, reactions[]
Pagination info including paginationToken for next page

location.description: Filter companies by location (e.g. United States, London)

industryId.description: LinkedIn industry ID. Comma-separated for multiple.

output_schema.description: List of matching companies (billed at 0.1 credit per element)

Echo of the resolved query parameters
